projectDescription: A Cloudflare Workers-powered API that generates dynamic SVG grids of technology skill icons for use in GitHub READMEs, resumes, and web applications.
keyFeatures: Dynamic SVG icon grid generation via simple URL parameters
Dark and light theme variants for every icon
Powered by Cloudflare Workers for global low-latency delivery
Zero dependencies — embed with a single img tag or Markdown image
REST API for listing available icons and fetching raw SVG data
publicApiSurface: GET /api/icons — returns JSON array of all icon IDs
GET /api/svgs — returns JSON object of raw SVG content keyed by icon ID
